financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Poor
bullets: The company made some money from selling products overseas, which helped balance out weaker sales at home.
Costs went up because of things like raw material prices, which made it harder for the company to make more profit.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Moderate Risk
bullets: The company faces potential new rules that could affect its operations, but hasn't explained how it will handle them.
There are challenges in getting important materials for making vehicles, which could impact production and costs.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment.
They are also performing well in how they treat people and communities.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong performance in selling products overseas and new plans for safety and green energy.
Even with some challenges at home, they focused on long-term success and stayed positive during the entire discussion.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company often gave unclear answers and didn't provide enough detailed information.
They only backed up a few of their statements with actual data, making it hard to trust their plans.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company is facing challenges in selling cars locally, which is a concern for its growth.
Despite local issues, the company is doing well with exports and new products, which gives hope for future success.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing well with exports, but struggles at home because fewer people are buying cars.
They are making more money overall, but their profits are not growing as fast because of tough competition and costs.
